message:
feat(conformance): add oracle diagnostics field and update test counts to 2,282

Add oracle_diagnostics field to UFuncOracleCapture struct and the
embedded Python oracle script to capture import failure reasons when
falling back from legacy → system → pure_python_fallback. The binary
now includes diagnostics in the error message when
FNP_REQUIRE_REAL_NUMPY_ORACLE=1 rejects a fallback oracle. Update
existing tests to include the new field.

Update README test count badges and per-crate table from 2,224 to
2,282 tests reflecting recent ufunc datetime, masked cov/corrcoef,
FFT metamorphic, iter, and io additions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,10 +4,10 @@ **Memory-safe, clean-room NumPy reimplementation in Rust.**
- Zero unsafe code. 2,224 tests. Bit-exact RNG parity. Every feature family green. + Zero unsafe code. 2,282 tests. Bit-exact RNG parity. Every feature family green. ![Rust](https://img.shields.io/badge/Rust-nightly%202024-orange) - ![Tests](https://img.shields.io/badge/tests-2%2C224%20passing-brightgreen) + ![Tests](https://img.shields.io/badge/tests-2%2C282%20passing-brightgreen) ![Unsafe](https://img.shields.io/badge/unsafe-0%20blocks-blue) ![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-green) @@ -35,7 +35,7 @@ FrankenNumPy rebuilds NumPy's semantics from scratch in safe Rust with two non-n | Stride calculus | Evolved over decades | Clean-room deterministic engine (SCE) | | Runtime modes | Single mode | Strict (max compat) + Hardened (safety guards) | | Conformance | Self-referential | Differential oracle against real NumPy | -| Test coverage | pytest suite | 2,224 Rust tests + 8-gate CI topology | +| Test coverage | pytest suite | 2,282 Rust tests + 8-gate CI topology | --- @@ -158,7 +158,7 @@ cargo test --workspace --all-features ▼ ▼ ┌──────────┐ ┌────────────┐ ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────────┐ │ fnp-dtype│ │ fnp-ndarray│ │ fnp-iter │ │ fnp-runtime │ - │ 116 tests│ │ 54 tests │ │ 79 tests │ │ 52 tests │ + │ 116 tests│ │ 54 tests │ │ 81 tests │ │ 53 tests │ │ promote │ │ SCE core │ │ transfer │ │ strict/ │ │ cast │ │ strides │ │ semantics│ │ hardened │ └──────────┘ └────────────┘ └──────────┘ └──────────────┘ @@ -766,16 +766,16 @@ let restored = Generator::from_pickle_payload(payload)?; | Crate | Tests | What it covers | |---|---|---| -| `fnp-ufunc` | 1,274 | Array ops, math, sorting, polynomials, NaN-correct reductions, 20 oracle tests, 4 workflow tests, 25 linalg bridge tests | +| `fnp-ufunc` | 1,325 | Array ops, math, sorting, polynomials, NaN-correct reductions, oracle tests, linalg bridge, FFT metamorphic, masked cov/corrcoef, datetime parsing | | `fnp-linalg` | 199 | Decompositions, solvers, norms, 16 NumPy oracle tests | -| `fnp-random` | 182 | 40 oracle-verified distributions, seeding, reproducibility | -| `fnp-io` | 143 | NPY/NPZ read/write, text formats, compression, 7 format oracle tests | +| `fnp-random` | 183 | 40 oracle-verified distributions, seeding, reproducibility | +| `fnp-io` | 146 | NPY/NPZ read/write, text formats, compression, 7 format oracle tests | | `fnp-dtype` | 116 | Dtype taxonomy, promotion table, cast policy | | `fnp-conformance` | 122 | Differential parity, metamorphic identities, adversarial fuzzing | | `fnp-ndarray` | 54 | Shape legality, stride calculus, broadcast contracts, multi-axis negative strides | -| `fnp-iter` | 79 | Transfer semantics, overlap detection, stride tricks, FPE handling | +| `fnp-iter` | 81 | Transfer semantics, overlap detection, stride tricks, FPE handling | | `fnp-runtime` | 52 | Mode split, fail-closed decoding, override-audit gate, Bayesian decision engine, evidence ledger | -| **Total** | **2,224** | **All passing in workspace** | +| **Total** | **2,282** | **All passing in workspace** | ### Oracle Test Strategy
